message:
test(daemon): Add ModelManager and info type tests (bd-p4vs)

Add 17 more tests bringing total daemon tests to 70:
- ModelManager: creation, hash embedder, caching, none/empty reranker,
  unknown embedder errors, unload_all
- HealthInfo/StatusInfo: serialization, Debug, Clone, multiple models

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
